global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with bold text and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting an exclusive offer for FluxStream with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and attention-grabbing base.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, are centered in a lighter shade of red.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: An abstract overlay shape in a lighter color, positioned centrally, adds depth to the design.

elements.label: Additional overlay
elements.description: Another abstract shape, slightly darker, positioned centrally to enhance visual interest.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Exclusive tonight' with a smaller line below it saying 'Cancel anytime' is prominently displayed.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: The logo 'FluxStream' appears at the top in a bold font, contrasting against the red background.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A prominent white button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' encourages user action.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small circular icon labeled 'UGC' is positioned at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bold and modern, exclusive offer, FluxStream.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main subject in the center, with body text below and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Exclusive tonight, Cancel anytime, FluxStream, Install now, UGC
